Home About Us

About Us

We are a full service heating and air conditioning system repair and installation company in California. We are licensed and insured for residential as well as commercial work. Our goal is to provide indoor comfort for home and businesses all year long. EZ is well known for its top-notch quality HVAC services and products. In addition, we offer 24-hour a day and 7-days per week emergency repair services as well as same-day services.

Do you want your cooling or heating system fixed? EZ specializes in all aspects of the heat and air systems solutions such as installation, repair, and maintenance services. We have an expert team of professionals who ensure superb workmanship, as they have decades of experience. We provide exceptional customer service.

We strive to deliver reliable and durable products that meet our customers' expectations. We only hire licensed, highly qualified and trained technicians to serve you. We have built a great reputation, thanks to our customer's appreciation and feedback on the quality service we offer.

  • Our commitment to providing efficient services is our key to success. Our mission is to guarantee optimum quality and provide the best installation and maintenance service to residential and commercial customers at a reasonable price. Moreover, we always respond to the customer's problems and questions on time.
  • Turn to our HVAC services company for any kind of air conditioning and heating system installations and repair requirements, including for water heaters, furnaces, heat pumps, among others. Make your home energy efficient through our brilliant HVAC services.

FREE

Estimate

Request a quote and get a free estimate for installation, repair, and replacement services from professionals

FREE

Service Call

From plumbing repairs to full replacements, connect with our experts to inquire about services at zero charges

15%

Discount Available

15% Off to the Police, Military, Fire Seniors and Teachers for Services up to $1000.

FINANCING

Available

Overcome financial barriers and keep your plumbing system up to date with our alternative financing options.

24/7

Service

Same-day Service For Any Issue Or Concern Related To Leakage, Clogging, Or Malfunctioning Of Appliances.

Don't Let Issues Interrupt Your Comfort & Budget

CALL EXPERTS NOW (760) 392 7616

What Our Clients Say About Us

"We needed emergency HVAC services, and they were there in no time. Their services are exceptional, and the team is always friendly and professional. They make sure everything is right before leaving."

Amanda R. - Orange County

"I've had my air conditioner maintained by this company for years. They always provide great service, and my system runs efficiently because of their routine checks. I wouldn't trust anyone else for my HVAC needs."

Mark T. - San Diego

"I couldn't be happier with the fast and efficient work. EZ Heat and Air is simply the best in town. Highly recommended!"

John L. - San Diego
